misc.title: A post from Kohei Tanaka, the composer behind “We Are!” and many other One Piece OST: “What kind of rhythm does a rain prayer have?” “I got a message from Oda-Sensei saying, ‘Please make it something
misc.text: A post from Kohei Tanaka, the composer behind “We Are!” and many other One Piece OST: “What kind of rhythm does a rain prayer have?” “I got a message from Oda-Sensei saying, ‘Please make it something scary and cool.’” I’m really looking forward to hearing what kind of music the rain-prayer rhythm turns into—but the one that feels like it might end up even stranger is Imu’s theme 😈 @kenokun

misc.title: El 17 de septiembre se lanzará el #amiibo del gólem de Mineru, ¡que cuenta con brazos articulados! Si lo usas en The Legend of #Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, podrás obtener una tela especial para la pa
misc.text: El 17 de septiembre se lanzará el #amiibo del gólem de Mineru, ¡que cuenta con brazos articulados! Si lo usas en The Legend of #Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, podrás obtener una tela especial para la paravela de Link, así como objetos útiles para la aventura.

misc.title: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a br
misc.text: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a bridge between white and black people is a huge symbol against racism!❤️ #BORUTO

misc.text: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves symbolism. KawaSara is possible to become the canon ship… #BORUTO
